title_1: BEAT CRAVINGS % DELAY IMPULSES % BUILD BETTER HABITS % STAY IN CONTROL
title_2: ImpulseGuard helps you get through cravings with 10-minute sessions. Pause before you act, turn resistance into gameplay, and track your progress.
step_1_description: Pick what holds you back, like snacking or smoking. Add fun avatars for gameplay.
step_2_description: Set a 10-minute timer and resist. Use relaxation or activities to reduce desire.
step_3_description: Resist and earn rewards — characters, levels, or pet accessories.
step_4_description: Monitor achievements and progress. Each step brings you closer to your goals.
faq_1_answer: Yes! Only for advanced features or customization subscription is needed.
faq_2_question: Will there be ads in the app?
faq_2_answer: No banner or window ads. Only rewarding app to collect additional bonuses.
faq_3_question: Where can I download the app?
faq_3_answer: ImpulseGuard is available on both Google Play and App Store. Download it now and start your journey to better habits!
